title: [Griffin's Keen, Valley View]
description: A jagged horizontal crack parts the rock along the base of the trail making an uncomfortable space between you and the mountain.  Although the trail here seems solid and is not as steep as in the higher reaches, the effect is dizzying.

wayto.4573: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'down'
